categories.label: VP Track Position
categories.description: Victory Point track from -20 (USSR) to +20 (USA). Adjusted throughout the game via scoring cards, events, Military Ops penalties, and other effects.

categories.label: Controlled Regions
categories.description: Number of regions where a player has achieved Presence, Domination, or Control during scoring. Used for final scoring reference.

categories.label: Space Race Position
categories.description: Position on the Space Race track (0-8). First player to reach certain milestones scores VP bonuses.

win_condition: First to 20 VP, or highest VP after Turn 10 final scoring
